summary: Iteration 53 - Invite Code System feature testing complete. All 13 backend tests PASSED. All frontend tests PASSED. Features verified: (1) POST /api/auth/register accepts optional invite_code field, (2) Registration with valid invite code links inviter relationship, (3) Registration with invalid invite code returns Hebrew error 'קוד ההזמנה אינו תקף', (4) New users auto-get 5 invite codes, (5) Existing users get codes on login if none exist, (6) GET /api/orientation/invite-stats/{user_id} returns codes, remaining count, invitees, invited_by, (7) POST /api/orientation/create-invite respects MAX_INVITE_CODES=5 limit, (8) Codes are PH-XXXX format verified, (9) GET /api/orientation/invite/{code} returns inviter_alias, (10) GET /api/profile/{user_id}/record returns influence_chain, (11) InviteSection shows stats (used/remaining), codes, copy button, invitees list, (12) AuthScreen shows invite_code field in registration form (optional), (13) ProfilePage shows invited_by_alias in identity header, (14) ProfilePage shows InfluenceChain section with invitees/inviter.
critical_code_review_comments: Invite code system implemented correctly at lines 199-270 (register), 276-337 (login), 4734-4857 (invite endpoints)
Code format PH-XXXX generated using random.choices with uppercase + digits at lines 246, 313, 4746
InviteSection.js fetches from /api/orientation/invite-stats/{user_id} and displays codes, stats, influence chain correctly
AuthScreen.js includes optional invite_code field with placeholder 'PH-XXXX' at lines 188-203
ProfilePage.js InfluenceChain component at lines 469-494 shows invited_by_alias and invitees
Identity header shows invited_by_alias at lines 115-118 in ProfilePage.js
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users. Inviter has 5 codes (PH-9RXU used, PH-BLDW/PH-J23G/PH-OIFV/PH-HQA4 unused). Invitee was registered with invite code PH-9RXU.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 tests the NEW invite code system. Key findings: (1) InviteSection is inside the Community expansion section on Home tab - click 'קהילה ושדה משותף' to expand. (2) invite-stats endpoint returns: codes array (with used status), codes_remaining, total_invites_used, max_codes=5, invited_by_alias/id, invitees array. (3) profile/record endpoint returns influence_chain with invited_by_alias and invitees array. (4) Code format: PH-XXXX (4 uppercase alphanumeric chars). (5) Create-invite returns success=false with Hebrew message when at limit.

backend_api_tests.test_invite_stats_endpoint_returns_expec: PASS - codes, codes_remaining, invitees, invited_by all present
backend_api_tests.test_invite_codes_are_ph_xxxx_format: PASS - All codes match PH-[A-Z0-9]{4} regex
backend_api_tests.test_profile_record_returns_influence_ch: PASS - influence_chain with invited_by and invitees
backend_api_tests.test_login_generates_codes_for_existing_: PASS - Codes generated on login if none exist

frontend_ui_tests.auth_register_invite_code_field: PASS - Input with placeholder 'PH-XXXX', marked as optional
frontend_ui_tests.invite_section_visible: PASS - Found after expanding community section
frontend_ui_tests.profile_inviter_influence_chain: PASS - Shows 'הבאת לשדה: Explorer' for inviter
